---
name: User Story 2
about: "(Administrator)"
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

In order to **track community feedback over time** as an **administrator**, I can **create new polls and view a record of past polls including votes and comments**.

**Acceptance Criteria**

- The administrator must be able to create a new poll with a question and at least two answer options.
- The administrator must be able to publish a poll so it appears on the homepage.

**Tasks**

- [ ] Create admin poll management page using HTML
- [ ] Style admin page layout using CSS
- [ ] Build poll creation form (question + options fields) using HTML
- [ ] Use JavaScript to allow adding multiple poll options dynamically
- [ ] Create functionality to save poll data (backend/database storage)
- [ ] Create functionality to publish poll so it appears on homepage
- [ ] Create poll history section using HTML/CSS
- [ ] Use JavaScript to display previous polls with vote totals and comments
- [ ] Store and retrieve voting results from backend/database for admin viewing
